title: task
description: rust/lichen-embassy/src/esp32s3.rs:15 - Imports lora_phy::RadioError and sx126x::InterfaceVariant which are private in lora-phy 3.0.1. Code fails to compile with --features esp32s3. Should use lora_phy::mod_params::RadioError and lora_phy::mod_traits::InterfaceVariant instead.
close_reason: Fixed: Use lora_phy::mod_params::RadioError and lora_phy::mod_traits::InterfaceVariant instead of private re-exports
